conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I’m okay, I guess. Just a bit tired. I haven’t been sleeping well, and I think it’s catching up with me.
How long has the tiredness been affecting your day?
About a week, maybe two? I get through the morning, but by lunchtime, I just want to go back to bed.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yeah. I sit down to do my work, and my mind just starts to wander. It’s like I’m reading a sentence, but I have no idea what it says.
How long does it usually take before you notice your mind starting to wander like that?
Usually around 20 minutes. It’s like my brain just hits a wall.
How have you been sleeping lately?
It’s been pretty bad. I wake up a lot during the night, and then I just lie there.
How long do you usually lie awake when you wake up?
About an hour or two, sometimes three. I just can’t seem to get back to sleep.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I tried to read a book last night, but I couldn’t focus on it. I think I’m just too tired to enjoy anything.
How long has it felt too tiring to enjoy things?
A few weeks, maybe? It’s been a while since I just sat back and enjoyed a movie or something.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
I don't know. I just try to get through the days. I guess I’m hoping things will get better, but I don't really see how they will.
What would need to change for you to start seeing how things could get better?
I don’t know. Maybe if I got more sleep? But even then, I don’t know if I’d be able to get the energy to do much with it.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yeah. I usually just sit there for a while, thinking about it, before I decide to do anything. It’s like my brain is just moving really slow.
How long would you say you typically sit there before you can decide?
Like 10, 15 minutes? Sometimes more. I just stare at the screen, trying to decide what to do, and I get nothing done.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No. I usually get through it, but I’m exhausted by the end of it.
How long has it been since you've felt this exhausted by the end of the day?
A few months? Maybe longer. I used to be able to go out with friends or help my parents, but now I just go home and sleep.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
Yeah. I still want to do them, but I just don't have the energy.
What kinds of things feel too tiring to start?
Everything. I used to love reading, but even that takes too much effort now.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
I don't know. I just feel like I’m stuck in this rut and I don't know how to get out of it.
Can you tell me more about what feeling stuck is like for you?
It’s like I’m just going through the motions. I look at my life and I think, "This isn't it. I'm supposed to be doing more." But I don't know what that is or how to get there.
When did this sense of emptiness start feeling this strong?
I guess it started a few months ago. I just feel like I'm just waiting for something to happen, but I have no idea what that is.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
I don't know. I just feel... flat. Like I'm just existing, not really living.
When you say you're just existing, does that feeling connect to anything you feel you should be doing differently?
Yeah. I feel like I’m not doing what I’m supposed to be doing, but I don't know what that is or how to get there.
When you say this will end soon, are you talking about ending your life?
I... I don't know. I didn't mean it like that. I just mean that I know I’m not going to feel this way forever, but I don’t know how to get out of it right now.
How's your appetite been?
It's been pretty low. I eat, but I don't really taste anything.
Has the lack of taste made you less interested in eating?
Yeah. I just sit there, and then I think, "Oh, I forgot to eat."
What parts of life feel most difficult or empty lately?
Everything. I look at my life, and I just think, "This isn't it. I'm supposed to be doing more."
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?
I don’t know. I just try to get through the days. I guess I’m hoping things will get better, but I don't really see how they will.
How much of this feels like giving up versus feeling exhausted?
I don’t know. I guess it’s a mix of both. I feel like I’m just too tired to keep pushing forward, but I also feel like I’m just... done.
Do you feel like people would be better off without you, or is it more that you feel stuck?
I don't know. I just feel like I’m just holding everyone back.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yeah. I get really upset about little things, like if someone is late or if I spill something.
